meta.question: In what cases is a new guide star acquired?
meta.finalAnswer:
Based on the TMT SysML model, a new guide star is acquired in the following cases:

**After tracking a new target** - According to a comment in the "Acquire and Guide" activity diagram: "Scott Michaels diagrams: StartAPTFullFrame happens after tracking new target."

The model contains an "acquireNewStar" parameter that is used in the Broad Band Phasing activity, indicating that a new guide star acquisition is part of the phasing process. The acquisition process involves:
- Receiving star coordinates (starCoords) as input
- Determining star type (starType)
- Setting region of interest (ROI), integration time (dit), and filter parameters
- The APT (Acquisition, Phasing, and Tuning) loop is started on a sub-frame which is received in the guiding loop

Additionally, there is a comment noting "Needed in case there is no acquisition" suggesting the new guide star acquisition is also triggered when there is no existing guide star available.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("guide star"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("guide"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Acquire and Guide"))) 
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "Acquire and Guide" .
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?node ?name ?type WHERE {

  ?activity vocab:Activity_node ?node .
  ?node vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?node rdf:type ?type .
}

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>

SELECT ?edge ?sourceName ?targetName ?guard ?weight WHERE {
  ?activity vocab:NamedElement_name "Acquire%20and%20Guide" .
  ?activity vocab:Activity_edge ?edge .
  ?edge vocab:ActivityEdge_source ?source .
  ?edge vocab:ActivityEdge_target ?target .
  ?source vocab:NamedElement_name ?sourceName .
  ?target vocab:NamedElement_name ?targetName .
  OPTIONAL { ?edge vocab:ActivityEdge_guard ?guard }
  OPTIONAL { ?edge vocab:ActivityEdge_weight ?weight }
}
LIMIT 50

  ?param vocab:NamedElement_name "acquireNewStar" .
  ?param rdf:type <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/activity%20parameter%20node> .
  ?param vocab:ActivityParameterNode_parameter ?paramDef .
  ?paramDef vocab:Parameter__behaviorOfOwnedParameter ?activity .
  ?activity vocab:NamedElement_name ?activityName .
}
LIMIT 10

request.reason: Found relevant comments in the Acquire and Guide activity that describe when a new guide star is acquired. The model contains the activity structure but guard conditions are stored as opaque expressions without readable text. The key finding is that a new guide star is acquired after tracking a new target.

request.answer:
Based on the TMT SysML model, a new guide star is acquired in the following cases:

**After tracking a new target** - According to a comment in the "Acquire and Guide" activity diagram: "Scott Michaels diagrams: StartAPTFullFrame happens after tracking new target."

The model contains an "acquireNewStar" parameter that is used in the Broad Band Phasing activity, indicating that a new guide star acquisition is part of the phasing process. The acquisition process involves:
- Receiving star coordinates (starCoords) as input
- Determining star type (starType)
- Setting region of interest (ROI), integration time (dit), and filter parameters
- The APT (Acquisition, Phasing, and Tuning) loop is started on a sub-frame which is received in the guiding loop

Additionally, there is a comment noting "Needed in case there is no acquisition" suggesting the new guide star acquisition is also triggered when there is no existing guide star available.

events.finalAnswer:
Based on the TMT SysML model, a new guide star is acquired in the following cases:

**After tracking a new target** - According to a comment in the "Acquire and Guide" activity diagram: "Scott Michaels diagrams: StartAPTFullFrame happens after tracking new target."

The model contains an "acquireNewStar" parameter that is used in the Broad Band Phasing activity, indicating that a new guide star acquisition is part of the phasing process. The acquisition process involves:
- Receiving star coordinates (starCoords) as input
- Determining star type (starType)
- Setting region of interest (ROI), integration time (dit), and filter parameters
- The APT (Acquisition, Phasing, and Tuning) loop is started on a sub-frame which is received in the guiding loop

Additionally, there is a comment noting "Needed in case there is no acquisition" suggesting the new guide star acquisition is also triggered when there is no existing guide star available.
